reasoning: The control AC-17(2) focuses on ensuring the confidentiality and integrity of remote access through encryption. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that communication channels are encrypted. The API server should have TLS enabled to protect communication with clients. Similarly, ingress controllers should enforce TLS to secure incoming traffic. Service meshes like Istio or Linkerd can enforce mutual TLS (mTLS) for service-to-service communication. Additionally, etcd, which stores sensitive cluster data, must have TLS enabled to secure its communication.
title: Remote Access - Remote access | protection of confidentiality and integrity using encryption imp
